name: CindyJS

en.when_to_use: Use it when projective-geometry constraints must remain valid after dragging, or when CindyScript should drive parameterized math or physics demonstrations, instead of hand-written canvas, which fails to keep dependent points, intersections, and degenerate positions consistent. Do not use it for ordinary statistical charts.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally draw only static geometry. It cannot keep projective constructions valid while dragging or reliably handle dependency propagation and degeneracies. CindyJS delegates these problems to a long-tested geometry kernel.

data_in.note: This is a trimmed native CindyJS({...}) configuration. Point coordinates in geometry use homogeneous coordinates [x,y,z], and dependent objects refer to one another by name strings.

geometry.name: string -- unique within the construction
geometry.type: string -- native construction algorithm, such as 'Free', 'Join', or 'CircleMP'
geometry.args?: string[] -- names of dependency objects; zero-argument constructions default to []
geometry.pos?: [number, number, number] -- required when type='Free'; omitted by default for other types
geometry.color?: [number, number, number] -- 0..1 RGB; defaults to the built-in color for the geometry type
geometry.size?: number -- defaults to the built-in size for the geometry type

schema.visibleRect?: [left, top, right, bottom] -- defaults to CindyJS's internal coordinate transform

spec.note: The canvas width/height attributes must be explicit pixel values, defaulting to 640x400; iron rule 3 forbids vh and percentage heights. visibleRect defines the mathematical coordinate range, not the CSS size.

when_to_use: 需要拖拽后仍保持射影几何约束、用 CindyScript 驱动参数化数学或物理演示时用它而非手写,因为原生 canvas 在依赖点、交点和退化位置的一致性上会失败；非做普通统计图。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画静态几何示意,无法实现拖拽时持续成立的射影几何构造、依赖传播和退化处理；CindyJS 把这些交给长期验证的几何内核。

data_in.note: CindyJS 原生 CindyJS({...}) 配置的裁剪版；geometry 中点坐标采用齐次坐标 [x,y,z],依赖对象通过 name 字符串引用。

geometry.name: string —— 构造内唯一名称
geometry.args?: string[] —— 依赖对象名称；零参数构造默认 []
geometry.pos?: [number, number, number] —— type='Free' 时必填,其他类型默认省略
geometry.color?: [number, number, number] —— 0..1 RGB,默认按几何类型取内置颜色
geometry.size?: number —— 默认按几何类型取内置尺寸

schema.visibleRect?: [left, top, right, bottom] —— 默认 CindyJS 内部坐标变换
schema.grid?: number —— 网格间距,默认 0(不显示)

spec.note: canvas 的 width/height 属性必须是明确像素值,默认 640×400；铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。visibleRect 决定数学坐标范围,不是 CSS 尺寸。

example._why: geometry 的 kind/type/args/齐次 pos 组合歧义高,给一个最小可拖两点成线构造。

carriers.widget: conditional:纯 canvas/ESM 可落 shadow；GitHub-only pick 缺版本且 npm 入口较旧,须 H0 验证构建与 CSP
carriers.codex: conditional:需允许大体积 ESM 与 canvas；基础几何无 worker/wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: Loader is broken (default export is not the CindyJS function), so runtime side effects could not be exercised/verified. Static hints of global pollution: +esm assigns `window.ClipperLib=` and `window.cindyDontWait=`. CindyJS is a heavy framework distributed as a global-namespace UMD (ref/createCindy.md: 'exports a single object into the global namespace, CindyJS') and ships CindyJS.css; a real shadow-DOM run needs live H0 verification. Marked unknown, not assumed.
